headline: IT Services & Consulting Q4 Earnings: Gartner (NYSE:IT) is the Best in the Biz
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Gartner (NYSE:IT) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q4 it services & consulting earnings season.

headline: Diversified Offerings Aid Gartner Amid Rising Costs & Competition
summary: IT tops Q4 estimates as research demand drives growth, but rising talent costs, AI disruption and forex risks cloud the outlook.
